label: Psychic ritual -- psychophagy
description: Ritual where the invoker psychically consumes the target's psychic energy, inflicting brain damage and granting a mood effect.

brainDamageRange.label: Brain damage range
brainDamageRange.description: Random amount of brain damage inflicted on the target pawn.

effectDurationDaysFromQualityCurve.label: Effect duration days from quality curve
effectDurationDaysFromQualityCurve.description: Curve mapping ritual quality to the duration in days of the mood effect granted to the invoker.
